description:
You are a pharmaceutical analyst documenting an ICH Q1A forced degradation study for Ibuprofen. Login to SciNote (admin@scinote.net / inHisHouseAtRlyehDeadCthulhuWaitsDreaming).

Create a project 'Ibuprofen Forced Degradation - ICH Q1A' containing an experiment 'Stress Testing Panel'. The experiment should have a branching workflow where 'Stock Solution Preparation' connects to three parallel stress tasks: 'Acid Hydrolysis (0.1M HCl)', 'Base Hydrolysis (0.1M NaOH)', and 'Oxidative Stress (3% H2O2)', all of which then connect to 'HPLC Purity Analysis' (5 tasks, 6 directed connections in a fan-out/fan-in pattern).

Add a protocol to 'Stock Solution Preparation' by transcribing the procedure from ~/Desktop/degradation_protocol.txt, with each numbered step as a separate protocol step preserving its full text.

Create an inventory 'Degradation Reagents' with columns CAS Number (Text) and Grade (Text), populated with: Ibuprofen RS (58560-75-1, USP RS), HCl 1M (7647-01-0, ACS Reagent), and NaOH 1M (1310-73-2, ACS Reagent). Assign 'Ibuprofen RS' and 'HCl 1M' to the 'Stock Solution Preparation' task.

On the 'HPLC Purity Analysis' task, add a text result summarizing findings from ~/Desktop/hplc_summary.txt, referencing 'Ibuprofen RS' via smart annotation (#Ibuprofen RS).
